Header files, configuration settings, Curie BSP-specific functions, and setup instructions for JerryScript.

## Folders
- **[include](include/README.md)**: Header files for `inttypes.h` and `setjmp.h` with definitions and declarations for non-local jumps.
- **[jerry_app](jerry_app/README.md)**: Configuration settings, main event loop initialization, and memory pool definitions for JerryScript on Curie and Quark BSPs, and partition scheme variables for QUARK code location and page allocation.
- **[source](source/README.md)**: Curie BSP-specific functions and assembly implementation of setjmp and longjmp for CPU state management.

## Files
- **[README.md](README.md.md)**: Instructions for integrating and building JerryScript with Intel® Curie BSP to run JavaScript on Arduino 101.
- **[setup.py](setup.py.md)**: Setup script for building JerryScript projects on the Curie BSP, including symlink creation and Makefile generation.
